generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that investing in civil defense preparedness doesn't just keep us safe—it also strengthens our national unity? When communities come together to prepare for emergencies, we build trust and resilience. Remember the 2024 tornado drills? Those saved lives and brought neighbors closer. Let's ensure our government prioritizes these programs. #CommunityResilience #NationalSecurity
